concepts.name: Graph
concepts.short_definition: A collection of nodes (vertices) connected by edges.

concepts.name: Vertex
concepts.short_definition: A fundamental unit in a graph, representing an entity.

concepts.name: Edge
concepts.short_definition: A connection between two vertices in a graph.

concepts.name: Directed Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph where edges have a direction, from one vertex to another.

concepts.name: Undirected Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph where edges do not have a direction; connections are bidirectional.

concepts.name: Weighted Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph where each edge has an associated numerical weight.

concepts.name: Unweighted Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph where edges do not have associated weights.

concepts.name: Adjacency
concepts.short_definition: The relationship between two vertices that are directly connected by an edge.

concepts.name: Adjacent Vertices
concepts.short_definition: Two vertices that share a common edge.

concepts.name: Incident Edge
concepts.short_definition: An edge that connects to a particular vertex.

concepts.name: Degree of a Vertex
concepts.short_definition: The number of edges incident to a vertex.

concepts.name: In-degree
concepts.short_definition: The number of edges pointing into a vertex in a directed graph.

concepts.name: Out-degree
concepts.short_definition: The number of edges pointing out of a vertex in a directed graph.

concepts.name: Path
concepts.short_definition: A sequence of vertices connected by edges.

concepts.name: Simple Path
concepts.short_definition: A path where no vertex is repeated.

concepts.name: Cycle
concepts.short_definition: A path that starts and ends at the same vertex, with at least one edge.

concepts.name: Simple Cycle
concepts.short_definition: A cycle where no vertex is repeated, except for the start/end vertex.

concepts.name: Connected Graph
concepts.short_definition: An undirected graph where there is a path between every pair of vertices.

concepts.name: Disconnected Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph that is not connected; it has multiple separate components.

concepts.name: Connected Component
concepts.short_definition: A maximal connected subgraph within a disconnected graph.

concepts.name: Strongly Connected Graph
concepts.short_definition: A directed graph where there is a path from every vertex to every other vertex.

concepts.name: Weakly Connected Graph
concepts.short_definition: A directed graph where the underlying undirected graph is connected.

concepts.name: Subgraph
concepts.short_definition: A graph formed by a subset of vertices and edges from a larger graph.

concepts.name: Spanning Tree
concepts.short_definition: A subgraph that includes all vertices and is a tree.

concepts.name: Tree
concepts.short_definition: A connected undirected graph with no cycles.

concepts.name: Rooted Tree
concepts.short_definition: A tree with a designated root vertex.

concepts.name: Bipartite Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph whose vertices can be divided into two disjoint sets such that every edge connects a vertex in one set to a vertex in the other.

concepts.name: Complete Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph where every pair of distinct vertices is connected by a unique edge.

concepts.name: Dense Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph with a number of edges close to the maximum possible.

concepts.name: Sparse Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph with significantly fewer edges than the maximum possible.

concepts.name: Graph Representation
concepts.short_definition: Methods for storing and organizing graph data.

concepts.name: Adjacency Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix used to represent a finite graph.

concepts.name: Adjacency List
concepts.short_definition: A collection of lists, where each list stores the neighbors of a vertex.

concepts.name: Edge List
concepts.short_definition: A list of all edges in the graph.

concepts.name: Graph Traversal
concepts.short_definition: The process of visiting each vertex in a graph systematically.

concepts.name: Breadth-First Search
concepts.short_definition: A graph traversal algorithm that explores neighbors level by level.

concepts.name: Depth-First Search
concepts.short_definition: A graph traversal algorithm that explores as far as possible along each branch before backtracking.

concepts.name: Graph Isomorphism
concepts.short_definition: The property of two graphs having the same structure, regardless of vertex labels.

concepts.name: Planar Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph that can be drawn on a plane such that no edges cross each other.
